name: Southern Peach Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease an 8-inch baking dish. Place peaches in the dish and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons granulated fructose, almond extract, and cinnamon. In a separate bowl, combine flour, remaining granulated fructose, baking powder, and salt. Add shortening, milk, and egg; stir until just mixed. Spread evenly over the peaches and bake for 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Invert onto serving platter.
Recipe makes 9 servings at 124 calories each Exchanges: 1 bread 1/2 fat
